event_triggers.reason: Active US-Israel war on Iran entering day 16; major escalation with Kharg Island strikes and continued Hormuz blockade
Israel approved $826M emergency defense procurement; South Korea and Taiwan announced major defense spending increases; THAAD redeployed from South Korea to Middle East
Russia confirmed supplying Iran with Shahed drones and targeting intelligence for use against US bases
EU extended Russia sanctions for 6 months (2,700+ entities); US sanctioned Rwanda Defence Force; Trump threatened Spain trade embargo; EU adopted 20th Russia sanctions package
Supreme Court struck down IEEPA tariffs; Section 122 tariffs at 10% expected to rise to 15%; new Section 301 investigations targeting 16 countries; US-China tariffs at record levels
Brent crude hit $100+/bbl; WTI posted biggest weekly gain in history; IEA released 400M barrel emergency reserves; Hormuz blockade ongoing; IEA cut demand forecasts
Strait of Hormuz blockade cut 20% of global oil supply; Jebel Ali container port severed from trade routes; shipping rerouting through Indian Ocean
US economy shed 92,000 jobs in February; unemployment rose to 4.4%; labor force participation at lowest since Dec 2021; stagflation fears from Goldman Sachs
EUR/USD at 1.22; USD/JPY at 139; significant dollar weakening on geopolitical risk and rate divergence; Fed expected to cut twice in 2026
Israel-Hezbollah war escalated; 687 killed, 800K displaced in Lebanon; Israel plans massive ground invasion south of Litani River

Nepal landslide election win by Balen Shah; Congo-Brazzaville election with internet blackout; Vietnam legislative elections; Slovenia and Denmark elections upcoming; Iran new supreme leader; Lebanon outlaws Hezbollah military
ACLED published Middle East Special Issue with comprehensive conflict data for Iran war; critical source for updating conflict metrics
China trade surplus hit record $213.62B in Jan-Feb; exports up 21.8% YoY; Five-Year Plan approved; Trump-Xi summit expected; Section 301 investigations launched
Sudan accused Ethiopia of drone attacks from its territory; first direct accusation against neighbor in civil war; Ethiopia alleged to host RSF training camp
